posts.text:
“Electric car maker Tesla, Inc., violated federal law by tolerating widespread and ongoing racial harassment of its Black employees and by subjecting some of these workers to retaliation for opposing the harassment, the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) charged in a lawsuit filed today.”
eeoc.gov/newsroom/eeoc-sues-…



Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Anti-White, anti-male discrimination ends now



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2001022917610758555#m

You can’t even get basic facts right, like that I am not a former NYT reporter. I just published a big essay for the magazine I work for last week. I’ve corrected you on this before.


Jonathan Turley (@JonathanTurley)

The Times was denounced by its own writers as well as pundits because it reported news that was deemed harmful to the Democrats, specifically Democratic mayoral nominee Zohran Mamdani. It was a catastrophically triggering event for many on the left... jonathanturley.org/2025/07/0

Y’all have made me come back to X just to make clear that those sharing this screenshot and pretending it’s about Mamdani are either intentionally engaging in misinformation or are inexcusably gullible. I haven’t worn my hair like this in three years. This tweet is five years old. Easily verifiable. Y’all chose not to.

I am, like so many others, also leaving Twitter. I deactivated my account last week but have decided to reactivate and lock it down so that no one else can post under my handle. However, I will not be using X going forward. I cannot in good conscience justify remaining here any longer. I am on IG @nikolehannahjones and also on Bluesky under this handle, but am not sure how much I will post there. Thank you for following and for all the times when this place was once good.
